name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: still not informed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
> Friend,
>
> I wanted to reach out before tonight's pivotal ad buy deadline. There are many voters out there who are still not informed about this election. It is our job to make sure they go to the polls knowing the stakes and the candidates records.
>
> Your support and engagement have taken us this far and will take us across the finish line. **[Will you chip in whatever you can before tonight's big deadline? ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c93/70cdc2ba/47d5c90f/3968538/1748306157/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ad-buy-march?refcode=em33116_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+whatever+you+can+before&utm_campaign=em33116_3&source=em33116_3")**
>
> Please use this personalized link if you are able to help: **[http://action.vanhollen.org/March-Ad-Buy](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c93/70cdc2ba/47d5c90f/3968539/1748306157/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ad-buy-march?refcode=em33116_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+httpactionvanhollenorgMarchAdBuy&utm_campaign=em33116_3&source=em33116_3")**
>
> Twenty six days to go. Together we will get this done and help elect a Democratic Senate majority committed to action!
>
> Best,
>
> Chris
>
>
>

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c93/70cdc2ba/47d5c90f/3968536/1748306157/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em33116_3&source=em33116_3") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

It is our job to make sure they go to the polls knowing the stakes and the candidates records. Your support and engagement have taken us this far and will take us across the finish line. "" Please use this personalized link if you are able to help: "" Twenty six days to go. Together we will get this done and help elect a Democratic Senate majority committed to action! name: Hillary Clinton
subject: re: tonight’s deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
We’re not backing down now. | Friend --

Even with our delegate lead, we can’t underestimate Senator Sanders and his team.

He won three contests last weekend and his supporters raised $4 million in the 48 hours following. They aren't letting anything distract or discourage them, and we can't either.

We have the pledged delegate lead, the most votes, the most wins, and the most support -- because we've poured everything we have into this campaign. We’ve fought hard in every single state. We’re not backing down now.

**With just a few hours to go before our fundraising deadline, we're still looking for 4 donations from your area to hit our goal by midnight tonight. Will you dig deep and chip in to let me know you're still with me? (When you do, we'll send you a free sticker to say thanks!)**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUxMjM3NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMDM4ODgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I have a proposal
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
Tonight Hillary Clinton is hosting two high-dollar fundraisers where some attendees at one event will pay $2700 each to get a photo with her. I'm sorry to say that is not what I'm offering.
I have a rally in the Bronx tonight to speak to voters before the New York primary. But because we run our campaign a little differently, I have a proposal for something else.
**[We're going to hold a fundraiser right here, right now, across America. And my request is to please make a contribution of $3 to help raise us the funds we need to win in Wisconsin, win in New York, and win the Democratic nomination for president.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s5-full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s5-full-e")**
We're trying to raise more money this month than we did last month. We're still short of our goal, but I know that with your contribution right now, we can hit it.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s5-full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s5-full-e")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s5-full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s5-full-e")**
So, there it is, that's our fundraiser. Thanks for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

Paid for by Bernie 2016

PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: BernieSanders.com
body:
#
This is our chance to absolutely shock the media, financial, and political establishments by raising more in March than we did last month.
Just two weeks ago they were calling for us to get out the race. Now we're going to show the world that our political revolution can win the Democratic nomination, the White House, and take our country back from the billionaire class.
**[Add your $3 contribution to help us win Wisconsin next week, New York later this month, and then elect Bernie our next president.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s6-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s6-full")**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s6-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s6-full")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s6-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-radical-idea?refcode=em160331s6-full")**
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). name: Alice Stewart
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

In Wisconsin, we are
seeing young people, families, and working Americans rallying
behind Ted Cruz. They know this election is an opportunity to
change the course of our country - to get back to a booming
economy where we are able to plan for the future.

Just four days out
from the Wisconsin primary, the people of the Badger State are
joining Governor Scott Walker to elect a candidate who has real
solutions focused on lifting all Americans out from a stifled
economy. Ted Cruz will rein in government and dramatically reform
the tax code so we can unleash the engine of economic growth that
has made this nation a landscape of opportunity.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

CRUZ NEWS

The Hill: Ted Cruz's
moment to shine

Politico: April
Fools': Cruz 'Rickrolls' on Trump debate

CNN: Fox poll: Cruz
up 10 points over Trump in Wisconsin

Breitbart: Ted Cruz
in California: The General Reviews His Troops

No, Rule 40 shouldn't be changed to make John Kasich eligible for
the nomination

Ted Cruz Earns Support of This Faith-Based Advocacy Group

Cruz's Debate Invitation

clean_body: Dear Friend, In Wisconsin, we are seeing young people, families, and working Americans rallying behind Ted Cruz. They know this election is an opportunity to change the course of our country - to get back to a booming economy where we are able to plan for the future. Just four days out from the Wisconsin primary, the people of the Badger State are joining Governor Scott Walker to elect a candidate who has real solutions focused on lifting all Americans out from a stifled economy. Ted Cruz will rein in government and dramatically reform the tax code so we can unleash the engine of economic growth that has made this nation a landscape of opportunity. name: Katie McGinty
subject: I’m excited to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-400787261228056576/-1001746352369041408?refcode=e20160401&refcode2=e20160401&amount=25)
---
Friend -- My team has called on you a lot in the past few days. And wow, did you ever come through. **I 'm excited to tell you that with your help and hard work, we beat our end-of-quarter goal, our most ambitious and most important goal to date. Thank you!**

This month has been incredible for our campaign. Our momentum has grown and we're looking stronger than ever:

* Just last week, President Obama and Vice President Biden endorsed our campaign, joining others like Governor Wolf, Senator Casey, and so many Democratic leaders at all levels of government.

* The respected _Cook Political Report_ changed our race rating from "Leans Republican" to "Toss Up," and the Washington Post named our race one of the most likely to flip parties in November.

* Progressive issue groups from across Pennsylvania and the country -- like SEIU and the League of Conservation Voters -- have pledged their support for our campaign.

**All of this is leading up to the big day -- our April 26th primary election.** We're in the home stretch. It'll be a busy month as we rush to reach undecided voters, spread our message, and meet with thousands of Pennsylvanians. But with you on our side, I know we'll do well.

Thank you for everything,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-400787261228056576/-1001746352369041408?refcode=e20160401&refcode2=e20160401&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-400787261228056576/439687003366227968).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Joe Sestak
subject: "Supposed"
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719beb/3476a20e/c775c0d/2745f0dd/3810578776/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Most of you know that the only reason I entered politics was as a "payback tour" to my country for the healthcare given to my family when I was serving our nation. I had come back from war, and my four year old daughter was struck with a malignant brain cancer that less than 10 percent of children survive. My little warrior wasn't "supposed" to make it, but, tougher than me, with the help of the military healthcare (TRICARE) you provided us, she won her battle. Please watch our ad below that explains why I am here, running for the Senate - in order to have other people's 6 - because they had mine in making sure Alex is also here, today. [**And please help me do so by contributing to make it happen.**](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719beb/3476a20e/c775c0d/2745f0dc/3810578776/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jscom2alex?refcode=EM160401FB")

---
Warmly,
Joe

name: Erin Wagner, RussFeingold.com
subject: Ron Johnson denounces Donald Trump?!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Finally. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4230/1c469400/5e586c3/351df05/3620321320/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153619683893215")
APRIL FOOLS'! Friend, Senator Ron Johnson didn't denounce Donald Trump. Senator Ron Johnson didn't denounce Trump when he called Latino immigrants "criminals" and "rapists." Senator Ron Johnson didn't denounce Donald Trump when he first proposed banning all Muslims from entering this country. And Senator Ron Johnson _**still**_ didn't denounce Donald Trump after he said, "there has to be some form of punishment" for women who have abortions. It would be great if Senator Johnson denounced Donald Trump and his hateful rhetoric. But instead, he's moving in the opposite direction. In fact, just last week, Senator Johnson said he'd be open to campaigning with Donald Trump! **[We need your help to spread the word that this isn't a joke: Ron Johnson wants to stump with Trump.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4230/1c469400/5e586c3/351df05/3620321320/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153619683893215")** "Stump with Trump? ... Just because it rhymes: It'd be the Ronald (and) the Donald."
[_Ron Johnson, 3 /28/2016_] [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4230/1c469400/5e586c3/351df05/3620321320/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153619683893215") What will "the Ronald and the Donald" talk about when they hit the campaign trail? Their best tactics for furthering attacks on women and women's health? Maybe they'll talk about who Donald Trump would like to nominate to the Supreme Court. Or, maybe Senator Johnson will try to help Trump figure out exactly how to get the Mexican government to pay for the ridiculous wall he hopes to build. **[The Ronald and the Donald are bad for Wisconsin and bad for our country. If you agree, click here to share Russ's Facebook post with your friends and family.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4230/1c469400/5e586c3/351df05/3620321320/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153619683893215")** Today might be April Fools' Day, but Trump's extremism is _definitely_ not a joke. Thanks, Erin Wagner
Social Media Director

| [SHARE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4230/1c469400/5e586c3/351df05/3620321320/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153619683893215")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4230/1c469400/5e586c3/351df00/3620321320/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4230/1c469400/5e586c3/351df01/3620321320/VEsP/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Thank you
body:
#
Thank you, sisters and brothers. I am overwhelmed and I am moved by the fact that **in March alone, our campaign received more than 1.7 million individual contributions from working Americans, and that it was our most successful fundraising month of the campaign.**
Never in my wildest dreams would I have imagined that so many people would come together in a way that is not only unprecedented, but is transforming American politics. Since we started building this political revolution together, we have received more than 6.5 million individual contributions. And do you know what our average contribution is?
Just $27.
**What we are doing through our campaign is proving that you don 't have to go around begging Wall Street, fossil fuel lobbyists, and pharmaceutical executives for outrageous sums of money in order to run a winning campaign.**
I am very proud of that fact. You should be as well.
And building this kind of broad-based, grassroots movement is important because this moment in our history requires transformational change that no candidate for president, not Bernie Sanders or anybody else, can achieve alone.
That is why we are building a political revolution that is bringing millions of people together. Working people who have given up on the political process. Blacks and whites, Latinos, Asian Americans, Native Americans, straight, gay and transgender, female and male, people who were born in America and people who immigrated here all joining with each other.
**And what we are saying loudly and clearly at every volunteer event, every rally, and with every contribution is that we believe this government belongs to all of us, and not just a wealthy few campaign donors.**
That is what this campaign is about.
That is the political revolution.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160401 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160401")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Your voter registration deadline
body:
#
Bernie Supporter,
Ready to support Bernie? In Maryland, you need to be registered to vote as a Democrat by April 5th. Now is the time for you to register to vote or update your voter registration.
Registering to vote is simple -- just click below and you'll be directed to the information you need. If you are already registered to vote, let us know you are voting for Bernie.
[Yes, I need to register
to vote for Bernie](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/ocs/md-voter-registration/gp2t4r)
[I need to update my registration to Democrat](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/ocs/md-voter-registration/gp2t4r)
[I'm already registered and voting for Bernie](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/ocs/md-already-registered/gp2t4r)
You can register to vote and vote if you have been incarcerated thanks to the work of organizers who won a historic campaign to end disenfranchisement. Please help to make sure your friends, family, and community know that they can vote on April 26th.
Together, we'll organize to build a powerful movement for Bernie in Maryland.
In solidarity,
Peter Clerkin
State Director
Maryland for Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Bernie Supporter, Ready to support Bernie? In Maryland, you need to be registered to vote as a Democrat by April 5th. Now is the time for you to register to vote or update your voter registration. Registering to vote is simple -- just click below and you'll be directed to the information you need. If you are already registered to vote, let us know you are voting for Bernie. You can register to vote and vote if you have been incarcerated thanks to the work of organizers who won a historic campaign to end disenfranchisement. Please help to make sure your friends, family, and community know that they can vote on April 26th. Together, we'll organize to build a powerful movement for Bernie in Maryland. In solidarity, Peter Clerkin State Director Maryland for Bernie Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
